title: The Death of SaaS | Why "Vertical AI" is Taking Over in 2026
full_text: The Death of SaaS | Why "Vertical AI" is Taking Over in 2026 BergTube 2600 subscribers 1 likes 65 views 13 Apr 2026 Stop paying for "seats" and start paying for "results." In 2026, the traditional Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) model is dying. We are entering the era of Vertical AI—autonomous agents built specifically for your niche that don't just store data, they perform the work.In this video, we break down:Why "Vertical SaaS" is being replaced by "Outcome-Based" AI.How to identify "Linear Workflows" in your business that can be fully automated.The difference between an AI "Assistant" and an AI "Agent."How to use the Model Context Protocol (MCP) to link your tools.A step-by-step guide to reducing your monthly software overhead by 80%.If you’re a solopreneur or agency owner, you can’t afford to stay stuck in the 2024 tech stack. It’s time to build a digital workforce that actually delivers ROI.
